title: Bypass suppresses approvals, not genuine information-gathering (exploring still asks for real info)
action: Encode the user's refinement: under full/total the agent never asks merely to APPROVE (takes its confident best answer), but still asks in exploring for genuine INFORMATION only the user can supply. Added to bee-exploring §4 Socratic step, the routing contract §Gate bypass, and R25; extended the doctrine machine-check to assert exploring keeps the litmus.

truths: bee-exploring §4 carries the info-vs-approval refinement with the 'confident best answer' litmus
routing contract + R25 state bypass suppresses approvals but keeps genuine information questions
doctrine machine-check asserts the exploring litmus and passes; sentinel bites; full 14-suite green
prohibitions: do not suppress genuine information questions — only approvals

trace.outcome: Encoded the user's refinement of total-autopilot: bypass suppresses APPROVAL questions (agent takes its confident best answer) but keeps genuine INFORMATION questions (a preference/knowledge gap only the user can fill) — exploring still asks for those even under total. Litmus 'do I have a confident best answer?'. In bee-exploring §4 + routing contract + R25, machine-checked.
